title: affaan-m/ECC
summary: ECC 是一个智能体工具性能优化系统，专为 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手设计。它集成了技能、本能、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发理念，旨在提升 AI 智能体的工作效率和代码生成质量。项目支持 MCP 协议，适用于多种 LLM 平台，是一个面向开发者的生产力工具。
summary_en: ECC is an agent harness performance optimization system designed for AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, and Cursor. It integrates skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development to enhance agent efficiency and code generation quality. The project supports MCP protocol and is applicable across multiple LLM platforms, serving as a developer productivity tool.
